name: send_app_control
description: Launch an application using implicit intent (operation, URI, MIME type). Can also query which apps handle a given intent. Uses Tizen app_control for intent-based app launching.

operation.description: The operation to perform. Common values: 'http://tizen.org/appcontrol/operation/view' (view content), 'http://tizen.org/appcontrol/operation/call' (make call), 'http://tizen.org/appcontrol/operation/share' (share), 'http://tizen.org/appcontrol/operation/default' (default)

app_id.description: Optional: explicit app ID to launch. If omitted, implicit matching is used.

action.description: 'launch' to execute the intent, 'query' to list matching apps (default: 'launch')

extra_data.description: Optional key-value pairs to pass as extra data
